name: Greek-Style Garlic-Lemon Potatoes
description: Yukon Golds simmered then roasted in a bright garlic-lemon-olive oil bath until creamy inside and golden — the carb for the grill night.
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Yukon Gold potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch pieces
1 tsp grated lemon zest + 3 tbsp juice (about 2 lemons)
recipeInstructions: Heat 2 tbsp of the oil in a 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add the potatoes, 1/2 cup water, and 1/2 tsp salt; cover and cook until the edges start to turn translucent.
Reduce to medium-low and cook, covered, until tender, stirring occasionally.
Off heat, whisk the remaining oil with the garlic and lemon zest + juice; toss with the potatoes, finish with parsley, salt, and pepper, and serve.
author: America's Test Kitchen

ai.cliffNotes: Yukon Golds simmered then roasted in a bright garlic-lemon-olive oil bath until creamy inside and golden — the carb for the grill night.
keyTips: Covered cooking with a little water then finishing uncovered gives tender insides without deep-frying.
Add the raw garlic + lemon off the heat so they stay bright, not bitter/scorched.
Variation - Olives & Feta: stir in 1/2 cup crumbled feta + 1/4 cup chopped pitted kalamata olives with the parsley.
